    Method
    Description
    InventoryItem
    InventoryItem.withAccumDep(BigDecimal accDep1)
    Sets the accumulated depreciation for this item and recalculates its net book value.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<InventoryItem>
    InventoryService.listItems()
    Retrieves a list of all inventory items currently managed by this service.
    Methods in nonprofitbookkeeping.service with parameters of type InventoryItem
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    InventoryService.addItem(InventoryItem item)
    Adds a new inventory item to the service's collection.
    void
    InventoryService.updateItem(InventoryItem item)
    Updates an existing inventory item in the collection.
